overview: Empower Health & Hormones provides sexual and reproductive health, hormone therapy, and wellness services to residents of Louisville, KY and surrounding areas. They deliver evidence-based, individualized care focused on perimenopause management, gender-affirming hormone therapy, sexual health, and preventative wellness.
highlights: Gender-affirming hormone therapy following UCSF guidelines
Sexual health, contraceptive care, and STI testing
targetAudience: Individuals seeking sexual and reproductive health, hormone management, gender-affirming care, and preventative wellness in an inclusive environment.
